# daytona_admin_runners (Data Source)

Lists Daytona runners using Daytona admin APIs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_admin_runners" "example" {
  region_id = "region-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `region_id` (String) Optional Daytona region ID used to filter admin runner results.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Daytona runners. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Runner API key.
- `api_url` (String) Runner API URL.
- `api_version` (String) Runner API version.
- `app_version` (String) Runner app version.
- `availability_score` (Number) Runner availability score.
- `cpu` (String) Runner CPU capacity.
- `created_at` (String) Runner creation timestamp.
- `current_allocated_cpu` (Number) Current allocated CPU.
- `current_allocated_disk_gib` (Number) Current allocated disk in GiB.
- `current_allocated_memory_gib` (Number) Current allocated memory in GiB.
- `current_cpu_usage_percentage` (Number) Current runner CPU usage percentage.
- `current_disk_usage_percentage` (Number) Current runner disk usage percentage.
- `current_memory_usage_percentage` (Number) Current runner memory usage percentage.
- `current_snapshot_count` (Number) Current snapshot count.
- `current_started_sandboxes` (Number) Current number of started sandboxes.
- `disk` (String) Runner disk capacity in GiB.
- `domain` (String) Runner domain.
- `gpu` (String) Runner GPU capacity, when available.
- `gpu_type` (String) Runner GPU type, when available.
- `id` (String) Daytona runner ID.
- `last_checked` (String) Last runner health-check timestamp.
- `memory` (String) Runner memory capacity in GiB.
- `name` (String) Runner name.
- `proxy_url` (String) Runner proxy URL.
- `region` (String) Runner region name.
- `region_type` (String) Runner region type.
- `runner_class` (String) Runner class.
- `sandbox_class` (String) Sandbox class supported by the runner.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID used to locate the runner, when applicable.
- `state` (String) Current runner state.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the runner.
- `unschedulable` (Boolean) Whether the runner is unschedulable.
- `updated_at` (String) Runner update timestamp.
- `version` (String) Runner version.
